section.heading: Regulations

content.p: The Office of Personnel Management shall prescribe regulations to carry out the purpose of this subchapter.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 95–454, title IV, § 402(a), Oct. 13, 1978, 92 Stat. 1160.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective 9 months after Oct. 13, 1978, and congressional review of provisions of sections 401 through 412 of Pub. L. 95–454, see section 415(a)(1), (b), of Pub. L. 95–454, set out as a note under section 3131 of this title.
